description_long: This is a thick, hardbound book with a dark brown cover adorned with ornate golden swirling patterns and geometric motifs. The book's edges are slightly worn, and the pages appear aged, giving it an antique or magical appearance. Two ribbon bookmarks, one red and one gold, protrude from the bottom, adding to its decorative and functional features. Along one side, a metallic arrow-shaped object is tucked between the pages, suggesting it may be used as a pointer or marker. The spine is decorated with the same golden patterning and features the title in a stylized script. The book exudes a sense of mystery and importance, suitable for a fantasy or historical setting.
description: A thick, ornate brown book with golden swirling patterns, ribbon bookmarks, and an aged, magical appearance.
description_view_0: The book is seen from the bottom edge, showing the two ribbon bookmarks and the intricate golden cover design.
description_view_1: The book is viewed from the side, revealing the metallic arrow-shaped object tucked between the pages and the full extent of the golden cover pattern.
description_view_2: The opposite side of the book is visible, showing the thickness of the pages and the continuation of the ornate cover design.
description_view_3: The spine of the book is shown, displaying the title in gold and decorative rivets at the corners.
attribute_cover_illustration: The cover features an elaborate, symmetrical pattern of swirling golden lines and geometric shapes, giving it a decorative and mystical appearance. There are no pictorial illustrations, only ornamental motifs.
attribute_spine_design: The spine is brown with gold decorative patterns and the title 'Potions II' written in a stylized script. Small round rivets accent the corners, adding to the antique look.
